zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Luttrell於1158年8月1日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓時，他的父親Alfred de Luttrell52歲，母親Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell49歲。他於1190年2月26日與Frethesant de Paynell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1215年被列為sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations。他去世於1218年在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Luttrell于1158年8月1日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓时，他的父亲Alfred de Luttrell52岁，母亲Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell49岁。他于1190年2月26日与Frethesant de Paynell结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1215年被列为sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations。他去世于1218年在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Luttrell was born on 1 August 1158, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Alfred de Luttrell, was 52 and his mother, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, was 49. He married Frethesant de Paynell on 26 February 1190. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1215, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations. He died in 1218, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Luttrell est né le 1 août 1158, à Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Alfred de Luttrell, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Frethesant de Paynell le 26 février 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1215, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations. Il est décédé en 1218, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Luttrell am 1. August 1158 in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alfred de Luttrell 52 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell 49. Er hat am 26. Februar 1190 Frethesant de Paynell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1215, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations aufgeführt. Er starb 1218 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Luttrell è nato il il 1 agosto 1158 nel Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Alfred de Luttrell, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Frethesant de Paynell il 26 febbraio 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1215, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations. Morì nel 1218, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Luttrellが1158年8月1日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアガムストンで生まれた時，父Alfred de Luttrellは52歳，母Mrs. Alfred de Luttrellは49歳であった。1190年2月26日にFrethesant de Paynellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1215年，57歳の時，職業はsole agent in queen berengaria negotiationsと記録されている。彼は1218年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Luttrell(이)가 1158년 8월 1일 영국 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alfred de Luttrell(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1190년 2월 26일 Frethesant de Paynell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1215년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations이었다. 그는 1218년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Frethesant de Paynell em 26 de fevereiro de 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Luttrell родился 1 августа 1158 г. в местности гамстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alfred de Luttrell было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Frethesant de Paynell 26 февраля 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1215 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations. Он умер в 1218 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey Luttrell nació el 1 de agosto de 1158, en Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alfred de Luttrell, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Frethesant de Paynell el 26 de febrero de 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1215, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era sole agent in queen berengaria negotiations. Murió en 1218, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
